    have h₂ : a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0) := by

        have h₄ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := by
          have h₅ : a + b = 0 := by linarith

    exact h₂
  · 
    intro h
    have h₁ : a + b + c = d ∧ (a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0) := h
    have h₂ : d = a ∧ b = -c ∨ d = b ∧ a = -c ∨ d = c ∧ a = -b := by

      have h₃ : a + b = 0 ∨ b + c = 0 ∨ c + a = 0 := h₁.2

actual_answer: fun f g x ↦ g x - f (x - 3) + f (x - 1) + f (x + 1) - f (x + 3)
explanation:
have h_main : ∀ (f g : ℝ → ℝ) (x : ℝ), g x - f (x - 3) + f (x - 1) + f (x + 1) - f (x + 3) = g x - f (x + 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x - 3) := by
  intro f g x
  ring_nf
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> linarith
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      linarith
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      ring_nf
      <;> linarith
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> linarith
    })

have h_final : (fun f g x ↦ g x - f (x - 3) + f (x - 1) + f (x + 1) - f (x + 3) : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ)) = (fun f g x => g x - f (x + (3 : ℝ)) + f (x + (1 : ℝ)) + f (x - (1 : ℝ)) - f (x - (3 : ℝ)) : (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ) → (ℝ → ℝ)) := by
  funext f g x
  have h₁ : g x - f (x - 3) + f (x - 1) + f (x + 1) - f (x + 3) = g x - f (x + 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x - 3) := by
    apply h_main
  have h₂ : g x - f (x + (3 : ℝ)) + f (x + (1 : ℝ)) + f (x - (1 : ℝ)) - f (x - (3 : ℝ)) = g x - f (x + 3) + f (x + 1) + f (x - 1) - f (x - 3) := by
    simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> linarith
  have h₃ : g x - f (x - 3) + f (x - 1) + f (x + 1) - f (x + 3) = g x - f (x + (3 : ℝ)) + f (x + (1 : ℝ)) + f (x - (1 : ℝ)) - f (x - (3 : ℝ)) := by
    rw [h₁, h₂]
  exact h₃

exact h_final

have h_main : (fun k ↦ ite (Even k) ((-1) ^ (k / 2) * factorial k) 0 : ℕ → ℝ) = (fun k : ℕ => if k % 2 = 0 then (-1 : ℝ) ^ (k / 2) * (Nat.factorial k : ℝ) else 0 : ℕ → ℝ) := by
  funext k
  have h₁ : (fun k ↦ ite (Even k) ((-1) ^ (k / 2) * factorial k) 0 : ℕ → ℝ) k = (fun k : ℕ => if k % 2 = 0 then (-1 : ℝ) ^ (k / 2) * (Nat.factorial k : ℝ) else 0 : ℕ → ℝ) k := by
    by_cases h : k % 2 = 0
    · 
      have h₂ : Even k := by
        rw [even_iff_two_dvd]
        omega

      have h₃ : (fun k ↦ ite (Even k) ((-1 : ℝ) ^ (k / 2) * factorial k) 0 : ℕ → ℝ) k = (-1 : ℝ) ^ (k / 2) * (factorial k : ℝ) := by
        simp [h₂, h]
        <;> norm_cast
      have h₄ : (fun k : ℕ => if k % 2 = 0 then (-1 : ℝ) ^ (k / 2) * (Nat.factorial k : ℝ) else 0 : ℕ → ℝ) k = (-1 : ℝ) ^ (k / 2) * (Nat.factorial k : ℝ) := by
        simp [h]
        <;> norm_cast
      rw [h₃, h₄]
    · 
      have h₂ : ¬Even k := by
        rw [even_iff_two_dvd]
        intro h₃
        have h₄ : k % 2 = 0 := by omega
        contradiction

      have h₃ : (fun k ↦ ite (Even k) ((-1 : ℝ) ^ (k / 2) * factorial k) 0 : ℕ → ℝ) k = 0 := by
        simp [h₂, h]
        <;> norm_cast
      have h₄ : (fun k : ℕ => if k % 2 = 0 then (-1 : ℝ) ^ (k / 2) * (Nat.factorial k : ℝ) else 0 : ℕ → ℝ) k = 0 := by
        simp [h]
        <;> norm_cast
      rw [h₃, h₄]
  exact h₁
exact h_main

have h_main : ∀ n : ℕ, (2 * n ^ 3 + 3 * n ^ 2 - 11 * n + 18) / 6 = n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) / 6 - 2 * n + 3 := by
  intro n
  have h₁ : 2 * n ^ 3 + 3 * n ^ 2 - 11 * n + 18 = n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) - 12 * n + 18 := by
    induction n with
    | zero => norm_num
    | succ n ih =>
      cases n with
      | zero => norm_num
      | succ n =>
        simp [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_one, Nat.mul_zero, Nat.add_zero] at *
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> omega
  rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) - 12 * n + 18 ≥ 0 := by
    induction n with
    | zero => norm_num
    | succ n ih =>
      cases n with
      | zero => norm_num
      | succ n =>
        simp [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_one, Nat.mul_zero, Nat.add_zero] at *
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> omega
  have h₃ : n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) / 6 - 2 * n + 3 = (n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) - 12 * n + 18) / 6 := by
    have h₄ : n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) / 6 ≥ 2 * n - 3 := by
      cases n with
      | zero => norm_num
      | succ n =>
        cases n with
        | zero => norm_num
        | succ n =>
          simp [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_one, Nat.mul_zero, Nat.add_zero]
          <;> ring_nf at *
          <;> omega
    omega
  rw [h₃]
  <;> omega

have h_final : ((fun n : ℕ => (2 * n ^ 3 + 3 * n ^ 2 - 11 * n + 18) / 6) : ℕ → ℕ) = (fun n : ℕ => n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) / 6 - 2 * n + 3 : ℕ → ℕ) := by
  funext n

have h_main : ∀ (n : ℕ), Nat.ceil ((n : ℝ) / 2) = (n + 1) / 2 := by
  intro n
  have h₁ : Nat.ceil ((n : ℝ) / 2) = (n + 1) / 2 := by
    have h₂ : n % 2 = 0 ∨ n % 2 = 1 := by omega
    cases h₂ with
    | inl h₂ =>

      have h₃ : ∃ k, n = 2 * k := by
        use n / 2
        omega
      rcases h₃ with ⟨k, rfl⟩

      have h₄ : Nat.ceil (((2 * k : ℕ) : ℝ) / 2) = k := by
        norm_num [Nat.ceil_eq_iff, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero]
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> norm_num
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith)
      have h₅ : ((2 * k + 1 : ℕ) / 2 : ℕ) = k := by
        norm_num [Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.add_assoc]
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> omega
      simp_all [h₄, h₅]
      <;> ring_nf at *
      <;> norm_num
      <;> omega
    | inr h₂ =>

      have h₃ : ∃ k, n = 2 * k + 1 := by
        use n / 2
        omega
      rcases h₃ with ⟨k, rfl⟩

      have h₄ : Nat.ceil (((2 * k + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) / 2) = k + 1 := by
        norm_num [Nat.ceil_eq_iff, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero]
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> norm_num
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith)
      have h₅ : ((2 * k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) / 2 : ℕ) = k + 1 := by
        norm_num [Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.add_assoc]
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> omega
      simp_all [h₄, h₅]
      <;> ring_nf at *
      <;> norm_num
      <;> omega
  exact h₁

have h_final : ((fun n : ℕ => Nat.ceil ((n : ℝ) / 2)) : ℕ → ℕ) = (fun n : ℕ => (n + 1) / 2 : ℕ → ℕ) := by
  funext n
  rw [h_main]
  <;> simp_all
  <;> rfl

exact h_final

  <;>

have h_final : ((fun n : ℕ => (-1) ^ (n - 1) / ((n - 1)! * (n)!)) : ℕ → ℝ) = (fun n : ℕ => ((-1 : ℝ) ^ (n - 1)) / ((n.factorial : ℝ) * ((n - 1).factorial : ℝ)) : ℕ → ℝ) := by
  funext n
  have h₁ := h_main n
  simp [div_eq_mul_inv] at h₁ ⊢
  <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial]
  <;> norm_num at *
  <;> ring_nf at *
  <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial]
  <;> norm_num
  <;> linarith

exact h_final

have h_subset₁ : {(2*l+1, l+1) | (l : ℕ)} ⊆ {p : ℕ × ℕ | 2 * p.2 = p.1 + 1} := by
  intro ⟨x, y⟩ h
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h ⊢
  rcases h with ⟨l, rfl, rfl⟩

  simp [mul_add, mul_one, add_assoc]
  <;> ring_nf
  <;> omega

have h_subset₂ : {p : ℕ × ℕ | 2 * p.2 = p.1 + 1} ⊆ {(2*l+1, l+1) | (l : ℕ)} := by
  intro ⟨x, y⟩ h
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h ⊢

  have h₁ : 2 * y = x + 1 := h

  have h₂ : x % 2 = 1 := by
    have h₃ : x = 2 * y - 1 := by
      omega
    have h₄ : x % 2 = 1 := by
      omega
    exact h₄

  have h₃ : ∃ l : ℕ, x = 2 * l + 1 := by
    use (x - 1) / 2
    have h₄ : x % 2 = 1 := h₂
    have h₅ : x = 2 * ((x - 1) / 2) + 1 := by
      have h₆ : x % 2 = 1 := h₂
      have h₇ : x = 2 * ((x - 1) / 2) + 1 := by
        omega
      exact h₇
    omega
  obtain ⟨l, h₄⟩ := h₃
  use l
  <;> simp_all [mul_add, mul_one, add_assoc]
  <;> ring_nf at *
  <;> omega

have h_main : ({(2*l+1, l+1) | (l : ℕ)} : Set (ℕ × ℕ)) = ({p : ℕ × ℕ | 2 * p.2 = p.1 + 1} : Set (ℕ × ℕ)) := by
  apply Set.Subset.antisymm h_subset₁ h_subset₂

exact h_main
